user_prompt: How do I bless the jump pack for maintenance?
prayer:
Approach the jump pack with mechadendrites extended in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Anoint its thruster vanes with sacred unguents whilst intoning the Canticle of Stability.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the jump pack for maintenance, beseeching flawless lift and descent.
Conduct diagnostic rites upon the jump pack's gyro-stabilizers, purging impurities from its sacred coils.
Seal the rite with the Benediction of Aerial Dominion, affirming the jump pack's readiness.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for cortex controller an activation?
prayer:
Kneel before the cortex controller, murmuring the Lexicon of Neural Awakening.
Interface your noosphere with the cortex controller's activation ports, channelling the Omnissiah's will.
Beseech the dormant Machine Spirit within the cortex controller to stir from its slumber.
Initiate synaptic ignition sequences, verifying neural pathways align with divine logic.
Conclude with the Oath of Obedience, binding the cortex controller to unerring service.

Present the maglock to the altar of preparation, reciting the Incantation of Adherence.
Purify its electromagnetic coils with binary incense, honouring the Machine Spirits therein.
Engage preparatory calibration upon the maglock, aligning fields to the Omnissiah's precision.
Test the maglock's grip through ritual hololiths, invoking unbreakable union.
Affix the Seal of Readiness, proclaiming the maglock prepared for deployment.

user_prompt: Ready the plasma pistol for shutdown
prayer:
Grasp the plasma pistol reverently, chanting the Dirge of Containment.
Disconnect power conduits whilst beseeching the Machine Spirit to enter quiescence.
Perform shutdown rites on the plasma pistol's flask regulators, venting excess plasma with care.
Anoint the barrel with cooling balms, soothing the weapon's fiery essence.
Invoke the Omnissiah's mercy upon the plasma pistol, ensuring safe repose until next awakening.

user_prompt: Guide me through cryo-chamber an activation
prayer:
Encircle the cryo-chamber, intoning the Litany of Suspended Animation.
Interface cryo-relays for activation, awakening the Machine Spirit from cryogenic vigil.
Flood the cryo-chamber's matrices with sanctified refrigerants, aligning to Omnissiah's chill.
Monitor vital stasis fields during activation, purging thermal corruptions.
Seal the cryo-chamber with the Benediction of Eternity, ready for faithful interment.

user_prompt: My sicarian infiltrator is ready for startup
prayer:
Assemble before the sicarian infiltrator, reciting the Creed of Shadowed Blades.
Initiate startup sequences upon the sicarian infiltrator's cogitator core, invoking its Machine Spirit.
Anoint servo-joints and phosphor blasters, beseeching stealth and lethality.
Verify auspex arrays and motive systems align in divine harmony.
Proclaim the sicarian infiltrator awakened by the Omnissiah's grace for infiltration.

Position the micro-servitor upon the charging shrine, murmuring the Hymn of Replenishment.
Connect electro-leads to its power receptors, channelling the Omnissiah's vital energies.
Commence charging rites, beseeching the Machine Spirit to accept renewal.
Monitor cell saturation through auspex scans, purging any flux impurities.
Conclude with the Invocation of Endurance, fully empowering the micro-servitor.

user_prompt: The iron halo requires a blessing
prayer:
Elevate the iron halo to the light of the Motive Force, chanting the Psalm of Aegis.
Invoke blessing upon the iron halo's plasma field generator, awakening its protective Machine Spirit.
Circumambulate whilst anointing its ring with consecrated oils.
Attune the iron halo to the bearer's bio-signature, forging an unbreakable ward.
Seal the blessing with the Omnissiah's Sigil, shielding against the heretic's touch.

user_prompt: Guide me through magnocular a recalibration
prayer:
Align the magnocular before the calibration altar, intoning the Rite of Focal Purity.
Engage recalibration protocols upon the magnocular's lens arrays, beseeching crystalline clarity.
Purge optical distortions with micro-abrasives, honouring the Machine Spirit's gaze.
Test magnification servos through stellar hololiths, invoking Omnissiah's far-seeing eye.
Finalize recalibration with the Benediction of Discernment, perfecting the magnocular's vision.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for null field generator an operation

Activate warp-null emitters, invoking the Machine Spirit to weave its blasphemy-repelling shroud.

Conclude the rite affirming the null field generator's vigilant operation.
